name: skill dataset entry references the source PR number for traceability back to upstream
command:
mkdir -p pr && printf 'diff --git a/x.js b/x.js
--- a/x.js
+++ b/x.js
@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
-eval(s)
+safeParse(s)
' > pr/diff.patch && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/pr-to-eval-dataset/extract.sh" --diff pr/diff.patch --pr-number 42 --emit dataset --out dataset.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q '"source_pr":42' dataset.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
